title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 261.259 - Board of commissioners
text:
261.259.  Board of commissioners. — 1.  The members of a district shall elect a board of commissioners of such district.
  2.  All commissioners of a district shall be owners or operators of land used for the cultivation of commercial crops within the physical boundaries of the district.
(L. 2004 S.B. 740, et al.)
